zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese de Monmouth於1145年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯時，她的父親Baderon of Monmouth36歲，母親Rohese de Clare55歲。她和Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1180年在愛爾蘭迪 本 米亞斯享年35歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭度布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohese de Monmouth于1145年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯时，她的父亲Baderon of Monmouth36岁，母亲Rohese de Clare55岁。她和Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath至少有4个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1180年在爱尔兰迪 本 米亞斯享年35岁，埋葬在爱尔兰度布林。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Monmouth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese de Monmouth was born in 1145, in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Baderon of Monmouth, was 36 and her mother, Rohese de Clare, was 55. She had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath. She died in 1180, in Diocese of Meath, Ireland, at the age of 35, and was buried in Dublin, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese de Monmouth est née en 1145, à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Baderon of Monmouth, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Clare, avait 55 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath. Elle est décédée en 1180, à Diocese of Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Dublin, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rohese de Monmouth 1145 in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baderon of Monmouth 36 und ihre Mutter Rohese de Clare 55. Sie hatte mit Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1180 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Diocese of Meath, Irland und wurde in Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Monmouth è nata il nel 1145 nel Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Baderon of Monmouth, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Rohese de Clare, aveva 55 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath. Morì nel 1180, nel Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese de Monmouthが1145年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスで生まれた時，父Baderon of Monmouthは36歳，母Rohese de Clareは55歳であった。彼女はHugh de Lacy Lord of Meathとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1180年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ メアスで35歳で死去し，アイルランドダブリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese de Monmouth(이)가 1145년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baderon of Monmouth(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Clare(은)는 55세였다. 그녀는 Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1180년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 미스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 드블린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Monmouth nasceu em 1145, em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Baderon of Monmouth, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Clare, tinha 55 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath. Ela faleceu em 1180, em Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Dublin, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese de Monmouth родилась в 1145 г. в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Baderon of Monmouth было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Clare, 55. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath. Она умерла в 1180 г. в местности диосес оф мит, Ирландия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности дублинь, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rohese de Monmouth nació en 1145, en Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Baderon of Monmouth, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Rohese de Clare, tenía 55 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con Hugh de Lacy Lord of Meath. Murió en 1180, en Diocese of Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Dublin, Irlanda.
